accessDenied.description: You have successfully logged in, but your account is not activated or does not have a role assigned in this system.

errors.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch data. Please try again later.
errors.createFailedVesselType: Failed to create vessel type. Please try again.

privacyPolicy.notAvailable: Privacy Policy is not available at this time.

modal.title: Privacy Policy Update
modal.subtitle: Please review and accept our privacy policy to continue
modal.noticeText: Our Privacy Policy has been updated. You must review and accept it to continue using the system.
modal.confirmation: I have read and understood the Privacy Policy and agree to the processing of my personal data as described.
modal.gdprNotice: By accepting, you acknowledge your rights under GDPR including access, rectification, and erasure of your data.

dataRights.title: My Data Rights
dataRights.description: Exercise your GDPR rights to access, rectify, or delete your personal data
dataRights.downloadDataDescription: Get a copy of your personal data in JSON format
dataRights.requestCorrectionDescription: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
dataRights.requestDeletionDescription: Request deletion of your personal data
dataRights.detailsPlaceholder: Please provide details about your request (e.g., which data fields need correction, reason for deletion request)
dataRights.noRequests: You haven't submitted any data rights requests yet
dataRights.requestSubmittedSuccess: Your request has been submitted successfully. You will be notified when it is processed.
dataRights.errorSubmittingRequest: Failed to submit request. Please try again.
dataRights.errorLoadingRequests: Failed to load your requests. Please try again.
dataRights.downloadSuccess: Your data has been downloaded successfully
dataRights.errorDownloadingData: Failed to download your data. Please try again.

gdprInfo.title: Your GDPR Rights
gdprInfo.right1: Right to access: You can request a copy of your personal data
gdprInfo.right2: Right to rectification: You can request correction of inaccurate data
gdprInfo.right3: Right to erasure: You can request deletion of your personal data
gdprInfo.right4: Right to be informed: You will be notified about how your data is processed
